description: Interactive state transition diagram visualizing a 3-state weather Markov Chain with step-by-step simulations and normalized transition probability sliders.
Stochastic text generator demonstrating Shannon's 0th to 3rd-order character and word-level statistical approximations to the English language.
Noiseless source coding simulator constructing a Shannon-Fano code tree in real time, displaying entropy limits, average code lengths, and compression ratios.
Continuous channel simulation graphing the Shannon-Hartley theorem, featuring interactive bandwidth, signal-to-noise ratio sliders, and animated waveforms.
Efficient coding playground simulating Richard Hamming's (7,4) block code with live parity calculation, error injection, and automated correction.
Interactive plot of the Nyquist-Shannon Sampling Theorem showing how sinc interpolation filters perfectly reconstruct smooth analog curves from discrete points.
Interactive binary symmetric channel Information Venn Diagram computing Joint Entropy, Conditional Entropy, Equivocation, and Mutual Information.
Interactive solver finding the root of the characteristic equation to calculate channel capacity for systems with variable symbol durations like Morse Code.
Interactive variance slider comparing Uniform and Gaussian distributions, visually proving that Gaussian noise maximizes continuous entropy.
Stochastic distribution chart visualizing the Asymptotic Equipartition Property (AEP), showcasing how sequence probabilities collapse into the Typical Set.
Interactive rate-distortion curve mapping Shannon's Theorem 22 limits, visualizing the absolute minimum required transmission rate for allowed distortion.
